teacherTrainingPromo.title: Fall Yoga Teacher Training + Mentorship
teacherTrainingPromo.description: Deepen your connections and become a Yoga Alliance® Certified Yoga Teacher. The Sama Method prepares you to teach the person—not just the pose.

events.cardDescription: Light bites and social hour - includes a Sama Yoga Sculpt class - appropriate for every level.
events.title: Summer Solstice Social
events.description:
Join us for a feel-good morning of movement, wellness and community featuring Sama Sculpt classes, refreshing drinks + bites, raffles and time to connect at Sama. Your ticket includes entry to the event plus one sculpt class! It's the perfect way to kick off summer feeling energized, grounded and connected. For women 20's - 30's!

**Ticket Includes:**

* Entry to the Summer Solstice Event
* 1 Sama Sculpt Class
* Refreshing drinks + light bites
* Entry into our wellness raffle prizes (for a free class, a guest pass and merch)

**What to bring:**

* Bring your yoga mat, or borrow
* Comfy workout clothes
* A connection with yourself and the present moment

We can't wait to celebrate the official beginning of summer with you!

events.cardDescription: A one-day immersive with Rebekah Jacobs to help you support pregnancy with confidence, care, and clarity. Earn 5 CE units.
events.title: Training: Pregnancy In Practice
events.description:
A Prenatal Yoga Training for Yoga Teachers

This one-day immersive is designed to support yoga teachers to meet the changing body with clarity, confidence, and care.

This 3-hour experience offers a grounded, intelligent approach to supporting the prenatal body — to ease discomfort, strengthen the mind & body and prepare for birth.

**You'll learn to:**

* Teach and practice with safety, awareness, and responsiveness
* Adapt movement, flow and shapes skillfully for each trimester
* Use breathing techniques as a foundation for regulation
* Offer grounding tools that cultivate presence and ease
* Understand key anatomy and create truly supportive rest

If you are a Registered Yoga Teacher (RYT), this training is eligible for 5 Yoga Alliance Continuing Education hours. Includes pre-natal sequences for each trimester and level. 

A refined approach to supporting pregnancy with steadiness, skill, and presence.

events.cardDescription: Deepen your inversion practice with Rebekah Jacobs. Build strength, alignment, and confidence.
events.title: Master Class: Inversions
events.description:
Find lightness. Overcome fears. Develop deep inner confidence: Inversions.

Enjoy the many benefits of inverted poses, whether you are just beginning or moving deeper. Inverted poses help us to reverse the aging process, stimulate the endocrine system, bringing balance & confidence into every aspect of our lives.

Turn your world upside down and let Rebekah guide you with her experienced, nurturing approach and support. Learn how to invert safely through specific intention and alignment. This workshop will include a warm-up to prepare us for some of the most potent inversions including Downward Facing Dog, Headstand, and Handstand. Move at your own pace and flip up your day with a little adventure!

events.cardDescription: A gentle pause created just for you with Caroline Reilly. Restorative yoga, breathwork, and rest.
events.title: Mini Retreat: Moms Replenish
events.description:
**A restorative retreat for mothers.**

Join Caroline Reilly for an afternoon of deep rest designed to **nourish the body, calm the nervous system, and replenish the heart.** Through restorative yoga, guided breathwork, and intentional moments of connection, you'll be invited to **slow down, soften, and receive** the same care you so generously offer others.

Leave feeling grounded, supported, and renewed.

**Includes:** fresh juices, candlelight, soft music, and optional hands-on assists.

**Reserve your place and allow yourself to be cared for. Your spot awaits.**

events.cardDescription: Explore advanced backbends and binds with Rebekah Jacobs. Expand your range and deepen your practice.
events.title: Master Class: Advanced Backbends + Binds
events.description:
Join our Founder, Rebekah for this intelligent dive into form and function. Learn to move toward advanced backbends and binds — to remember that even when bound, there is freedom.

This event is designed for students who want to move beyond repetition and into refinement — understand the "why" behind poses to build confidence, strength and clarity, with care. Deepen your understanding of biomechanics, interoception, and sustainable progression. You'll leave with newfound strength, individual feedback and wisdom you can integrate immediately onto your mat.

Expect fun, anatomical insight, hands on support and nervous system aware refinements for bound side angle, wheel, and bird of paradise — designed to develop your courage and resilience.

Come curious. Leave empowered.

events.cardDescription: Build strength and refine your standing postures with Rebekah Jacobs. Precision, power, and presence.
events.title: Master Class: Strength + Standing
events.description:
Join to enhance your **strength,** tone your glutes and legs and fortify your **standing poses** including Warrior I, II, III, Triangle, Half Moon Dancer.

This event is designed for students who want to **move beyond repetition and into refinement** — understand the "why" behind poses to build confidence, strength and clarity, with care.

Deepen your understanding of biomechanics, interoception, and sustainable progression. You'll **leave with newfound strength, individual support and wisdom.**

Expect fun, anatomical insight and nervous system aware refinements — designed to support your longevity and resilience — in body and mind.

**Come curious. Leave empowered.**

events.cardDescription: Help children build confidence, cultivate kindness, and develop lifelong tools for focus, resilience, and emotional well-being.
events.title: The Sama Method® Kids Yoga Training
events.description:
Join expert educator Amy Bilden to learn age-appropriate yoga, mindfulness, breathwork, and self-regulation practices for **Minis (3–6), Kids (7–10), and Tweens & Teens (11+).** Ideal for yoga teachers, educators, counselors, parents, and caregivers.

Includes a comprehensive manual with sequences, meditations and practical tools you can use immediately.

**The Sama Method® is rooted in a simple belief: before we teach a pose, we learn to see the person.**

**Includes:**

* Comprehensive Manual
* Certificate of Completion 
* Yoga Alliance CE Hours Eligible

**Come curious. Leave equipped to make a lasting difference in the lives of children.**

events.cardDescription: Experience the soothing vibrations of crystal singing bowls to quiet the mind, relax the body, and restore balance before the rhythms of a new season begin.
events.title: Summer Sound Bath
events.description:
Join us for an **immersive sound bath** featuring crystal singing bowls designed to **calm your nervous system, quiet your mind, and restore your body.**  

Take these moments, immersed in healing sounds, to **reflect and reconnect before the rhythms of a new season begin.** Leave feeling centered, restored, and prepared for the shifts ahead.
